_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=94 (set at 94.55 after atlassian message+ADF pin + kpi aggregateHistory + security ?? [] probe-count + oauth equiv pragmas, buffer 0.55). The ratchet is non-decreasing: bump these up as the score climbs further, never lower.
